snippet.title: My All-Time Favorite Perfume Collection! ✨ (Luxe & Budget)
snippet.description:
Sharing my current perfume rotation! From high-end luxury scents like YSL Black Opium and Valentino Donna Born in Roma to affordable favorites from Zara and Miniso. Which scent profile is your favorite? Let me know in the comments!

Featured in this video:

• YSL Libre & Black Opium

• Valentino Donna Born in Roma

• Zara Nuit

• Michael Kors Extreme Rush

• Miniso Romantic Verse

• Bella Vita White Oud
